name: regex-lab-mcp
description: MCP server for regex testing, matching, replacing, and validation

tools.name: test_regex
tools.description: Test a regex pattern against a string. Returns all matches with positions and capture groups.

tools.name: replace_regex
tools.description: Replace matches in a string using a regex pattern and replacement string.

tools.name: validate_regex
tools.description: Check if a regex pattern is syntactically valid.
